data.description: Q1 2026 unaudited interim accounts released; significant numbers included.

data.title: Visionary Holdings Inc. Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Notification
data.description: In Toronto on April 10, 2026, Visionary Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: GV) disclosed that they were notified by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on April 7, 2026, regarding non-compliance with the minimum bid price stipulation under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) for staying listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market.

data.title: Correction: Financial calendar 2026
data.description: Nordecon AS has updated its financial calendar, with the audited Annual Report for the financial year 2025 now set to be released in week 18 of 2026. This is a one-week delay from the initial schedule of week 17 of 2026.

data.title: LHV Group's own share acquisition transactions
data.description: LHV Group has reported the acquisition of their own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange within the period of April 3 to April 9, 2026. The group purchased shares during this time frame. The exact numbers of shares acquired were not provided.

data.title: Trident Digital Tech Holdings and Ripple Strategy Holding Sign Strategic Cooperation Agreement to Co-Build a Stablecoin Payment System for Africa Market
data.description: Ripple is set to offer technical support for the TDTH Africa Project by providing its Ripple USD technology. This partnership will allow for seamless transactions and financial operations within the project. The initiative aims to enhance efficiency and accessibility in financial services in Africa. Through the integration of Ripple's technology, the project anticipates significant growth and impact. This collaboration underscores Ripple's commitment to fostering innovation and inclusion in the region. With Ripple's support, the TDTH Africa Project is positioned for success, potentially reaching millions with its services.

data.title: One and One Green Technologies Announces Lock-Up Extension by Key Shareholders
data.description: On April 10, 2026, in San Rafael, Bulacan, the company One and One Green Technologies. INC announced that some major shareholders have agreed to extend their lock-up period after their IPO. The Philippines-based recycler, holding a government license to import and process hazardous waste, disclosed that the extension would be for an extra three months from the initial deadline of April 9, 2026. One and One is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol YDDL.

data.title: Cyera Recognized as a Leader in Sensitive Data Discovery And Classification
data.description: Cyera, an AI Security Platform designed for the era of agents, has been recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Sensitive Data Discovery And Classification Solutions, Q2, 2026. The evaluation, which assessed factors like current offering, strategy, and customer feedback, highlighted Cyera's strong potential to serve as a decision control layer for data. The report emphasized that Cyera is well-equipped to actualize this vision promptly due to its innovative approach and solid strategic positioning.

data.title: BigID Recognized as a Leader in Independent Evaluation of Sensitive Data Discovery and Classification Solutions as Company Expands AI Security and Governance Platform
data.description: BigID, a data security platform, recently achieved top scores in eleven key criteria, such as Enrichment for Classification, Integrations, Innovation, and Roadmap. The company introduced four new AI Security capabilities at the RSA Conference 2026 held in New York on April 10, 2026. This signifies a significant accomplishment for BigID in the field of data security, as it continues to innovate and improve its offerings.

data.title: Industrial Agitators Market worth $4.73 billion by 2032 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, recent data from MarketsandMarkets™ reveals that the industrial agitators market is anticipated to grow significantly, with projections indicating a rise to USD 4.73 billion by 2032 from its current value of USD 3.56 billion in 2026. This growth is expected to occur at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.9% during the forecast period. The report includes an analysis of 165 market data Tables and 50 Figures, offering valuable insights into this evolving market landscape.

data.title: Global Environmental Test Chambers Market Fueled by Automotive and Electronics Demand | Valuates Reports
data.description: In Bangalore, India on April 10, 2026, the Global Environmental Test Chambers Market Research Report revealed a silent competition unfolding in engineering laboratories internationally. The focus is not on creating the speediest product, but on conducting the most thorough validation processes. This trend signifies a shift towards meticulous testing in the industry.

data.title: Students 2 Science Names New Trustees to the Board
data.description: Whippany, New Jersey - On April 10, 2026, Students 2 Science (S2S), a nonprofit organization in New Jersey focused on providing STEM opportunities for students, announced the addition of three new members to its Board of Trustees. This move comes as part of the organization's efforts to expand its leadership team and enhance its impact on the community. Students 2 Science operates as a 501(c)(3) organization and aims to inspire and empower students through engaging STEM programs. The new trustees bring a wealth of experience and expertise to the board, further strengthening S2S's ability to support students in pursuing STEM education.

data.title: The Sterling Group Completes the Acquisition of Healthcare Linen Services Group
data.description: On April 10, 2026, Houston-based private equity firm, The Sterling Group, disclosed the purchase of Healthcare Linen Services Group (HLSG) from York Capital Management's private equity arm. Sterling is known for its emphasis on operational efficiency and targets middle-market companies. The acquisition further solidifies Sterling's presence in the healthcare sector. Specific financial details of the transaction were not disclosed.

data.title: Bitcoin soars past $73K with rising STRC bid from Strategy, Galaxy stock surges, Scott Bessent urges Senate to pass Clarity Act, Brian Armstrong agrees.
data.description: The Strategy Resilience and Opportunity Fund (STRC) is supporting the rise of Bitcoin with a notable bid increase. Galaxy's stock is performing strongly, and Scott Bessent has urged the Senate to approve the Clarity Act, with Brian Armstrong supporting the call as well.

data.title: Continental Battery Systems Selected by Mazda as Nationwide Battery Partner Across U.S. Dealer Network
data.description: In Dallas, CBS has announced Mazda’s choice of supplier for its U.S. batteries. This decision is set to provide reliable solutions, nationwide distribution, and dedicated dealer support to fuel growth for Mazda.
